= Quantum Amp =
Unlocked with the [[Nebula]]. The Nebula is unlocked after [[Koryeon Domain]] is 100% with {{RewardIconWithText|Nebula Detector}}.

== AFFCT Slots ==
{|class="wikitable"
!AFFCT Slot
!Requirements
|-
|FAME||Unlocked at start
|-
|ART||Quantum Amp Level 10
|-
|FTH||Quantum Amp Level 20
|-
|CIV||Quantum Amp Level 30
|-
|TECH||Quantum Amp Level 40
|}

== Quantum Amp Levels ==
{| class="mw-collapsible wikitable"
! rowspan="2" |Level
! colspan="3" |Cost
! rowspan="2" |Productivity
! rowspan="2" |Max Capacity

|-
!{{RewardIconWithText|B-Tad}}
!{{RewardIconWithText|Quantum Gel}}
!Constellation Level

|-
|1||0||0||0||1%||10
|-
|2||24.8k||20||0||2%||10
|-
|3||28.4k||22||0||3%||11
|-
|4||32.3k||24||5||4%||11
|-
|5||36.4k||26||10||5%||12
|-
|6||41.0k||28||15||7%||12
|-
|7||45.9k||32||20||9%||13
|-
|8||51.1k||36||25||11%||13
|-
|9||56.6k||40||30||13%||14
|-
|10||62.7k||46||35||15%||14
|-
|11||69.2k||52||40||18%||15
|-
|12||76.0k||58||45||21%||15
|-
|13||83.0k||66||50||24%||16
|-
|14||90.8k||74||55||27%||16
|-
|15||99.0k||82||60||30%||17
|-
|16||107k||92||70||34%||17
|-
|17||116k||102||80||38%||18
|-
|18||125k||112||90||42%||18
|-
|19||135k||124||100||46%||19
|-
|20||146k||136||120||50%||19
|-
|21||157k||148||140||55%||20
|-
|22||168k||164||160||60%||20
|-
|23||181k||180||180||65%||21
|-
|24||196k||196||200||70%||21
|-
|25||209k||216||220||75%||22
|-
|26||223k||236||240||81%||22
|-
|27||238k||256||260||87%||23
|-
|28||254k||280||280||93%||23
|-
|29||270k||304||300||99%||24
|-
|30||287k||328||320||105%||24
|-
|31||305k||358||340||112%||25
|-
|32||324k||388||360||119%||25
|-
|33||342k||418||390||126%||26
|-
|34||363k||452||420||133%||26
|-
|35||384k||486||450||140%||27
|-
|36||404k||520||480||148%||27
|-
|37||426k||560||510||156%||28
|-
|38||449k||600||540||164%||28
|-
|39||474k||640||570||172%||29
|-
|40||498k||690||600||180%||29
|-
|41||521k||740||630||189%||30
|-
|42||552k||790||660||198||30
|-
|43||584k||850||690||207||31
|-
|44||615k||910||720||216||31
|-
|45||650k||970||750||225||32
|-
|46||683k||1,040||780||235||32
|-
|47||720k||1,110||810||245||33
|-
|48||758k||1,180||840||255||33
|-
|49||795k||1,260||870||265||34
|-
|50||834k||1,340||900||275||34
|-
|51||875k||1,420||930||286||35
|-
|52||915k||1,510||960||297||35
|-
|53||956k||1,600||990||308||36
|-
|54||1M||1,690||1,020||319||36
|}

[[Category:Nebula]]
